title: Episode 18 Who was to blame
wikitext:
[]: Episode 18: Who was to blame?             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Mon Oct 10, 2005 8:05 am In the episode, Ambivalence, who did you think was to blame for not telling Shinji who the pilot of Unit 03 was until he killed the 13th Angel? Well, here are my prime suspects: Misato - She could have told Shinji right from the start who the pilot was when she was going to Matsushiro. I mean, Shinji already knew about what happened to Unit 04 and the fact that Unit 03 was being brought from America (no thanks to Kensuke of course) but she got interupted by Kensuke's "proposal". She even said to Ritsuko that she couldn't tell Shinji. But she regretted it big time for not telling him at the end when talking to Kaji after the Matsushiro accident. Asuka - Now, she is one to question. We saw from the start that she was majorly pissed off with the chosing of Touji as the pilot. She could have easily told Shinji who he pilot was when she found out that Shinji didn't know, but for some very odd reason, she didn't tell him, even though she already knew (What is up with that!!!). She decided to tell Shinji during their battle, but got wiped out. Touji - Touji was feeling quiet and depressed with the whole pilot situation. When Rei went to see Touji, he realised that Shinji was the only one who didn't know anything about the pilot. He could have talked to Shinji himself to get it out of his system. (Kinda like in the manga version). Shinji - Shinji could have realised who the pilot was by the amount of clues that were literally thrown at him; Misato afraid of Shinji's wrath, Asuka more angry than usual and leaving before Shinji to school but getting in after him, Touji's unusual behaviour. These could have given him some ideas about the pilot but he didn't pick them up. Well, that's my choices. What is your opinion?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Oct 10, 2005 8:33 am Misato plain and simple. She tryed to protect him, ended up causing a lot damage by not. Worse off she didnt realy talk to him about it after it happined.

[]:             Quote Post by K2Grey » Mon Oct 10, 2005 3:02 pm Ikari-shirei. It's all Gendo's fault, whatever it is

[]:             Quote Post by S.O.M » Mon Oct 10, 2005 4:16 pm Misato: Knew Touji was the new pilot from the start Asuka: Found out about Touji and of course was pissy about could vent some anger and told Shinji Touji: Was the pilot for sakes! It's good company policy to have a good relationship with your co-workers So, it's all there fault!

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Mon Oct 10, 2005 4:26 pm Couldn't it have been everyone's fault? Misato could have been at fault for not telling him, even though she knew. Gendo could have been at fault for using the dummy plug and killing/maiming him. Asuka could be at fault for not saying anything sooner (And why not? She tells everyone else about everything...), and Touji could have screwed up by not mentioning anything.

[]:             Quote Post by The Sandman » Mon Oct 10, 2005 4:50 pm I think Touji is to blame because IMO he became the person he always hated to be. An Eva pliot. Go back to episode 3 where Touji and Shinji first meet. Touji was P.O. because his sister was hurt when Sachiel attacked. Because of that Touji beat the crap out of Shinji after class. And now he's a pliot. Just like Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Oct 10, 2005 7:50 pm Misato: Place brunt of blame here. Classic case of bad parenting here. Bad, bad parenting. Never hide children from the truth. It will only end in tears and therapy. You can tell Misato never had any sex talks with Shinji either.... well, except for... you know.... Asuka: It's just classic Asuka being cantankerous and petulant. What a jerk! Asuka has serious social problems, nearly all of which are inexcusable. ("He didn't kiss me properly!" What kind of excuse is that?) Touji: Blameless. Why should he tell anyone? It's private, more or less. Can we get a little sympathy over here? Shinji: Shinji's only in a position to speculate to begin with. Realistically, there's no way he could have known for sure Touji was in there. He may have suspected to be sure, but that's as far as his certainty could weakly go. Consider the fact that Asuka only discovered the fact by accident. You missed one: Rei: Well... It's not like she's the talkative type to being with. She probably filed it under "irrelevent" and let it be, or perhaps assummed Shinji knew. Slight possibility: Kensuke: He knows much. Much to much. He went to Misato asking to be made a pilot. Did he know about Class 2-B?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Mon Oct 10, 2005 8:52 pm @OMF Of the people you listed only Misato had the responcibility as guardian and direct supior to Shinji to inform him their was a fourth child and who it was.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Tue Oct 11, 2005 12:58 pm While I agree that Misato should have told him, I give her some sympathy. It's only something that people do, not tell others information out of fear that that person will be upset or something bad that might come out of it. Also, Misato had no idea about what was going to happen. But yeah, place blame on Misato, but give her some sympathy.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Oct 11, 2005 1:51 pm wait one moment though. did anyone ever tell Shinji that Asuka was the piolet before he actually met her???? shouldnt that be taken into consideration

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Oct 11, 2005 3:42 pm This is a typical cock-up, rather than conspiracy, thing. Not telling Shinji is one of those things where diffused responsibility can be seen at work - if something can be seen as "somebody else's problem", it vanishes.
